features.name: 字幕烧入 CRITICAL bug 修复 — SRT 文件名并发冲突
features.description: 修复 Code Quality review 发现的 CRITICAL bug：compose.py:440 的 `getattr(ctx, 'run_id', None) or ctx.project_id` 因 AgentContext 实际字段是 `run: AgentRun`（不是 `run_id`）永远 fallback 到 ctx.project_id，导致 SRT 文件名恒退化为 {project_id}_{project_id}.srt，并发 run 必冲突。最小修复：1 行 fix + 2 个 regression test。
features.verification: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/test_orchestration/test_subtitle_burnin.py -v && uv run pyright app/agents/compose.py && uv run ruff check app tests
features.evidence: 2026-06-16: compose.py:440 `getattr(ctx, 'run_id', None) or ctx.project_id` → `ctx.run.id`, 2 regression tests added (test_srt_filename_uses_run_id_not_getattr_fallback + test_srt_filename_includes_run_id_for_concurrent_safety), 4 subtitle_burnin tests pass + 1 skip (FFmpeg integration), pyright 0 errors, ruff 0
features.notes: Phase 0b review CRITICAL fix。Code Quality agent 在 5 路 review 中找到的 1 CRITICAL bug 的最小修复。其他 6 MAJOR issue（代码重复、bare except、utf-8-sig BOM、try/finally cleanup、shutil.which、模块级 import）按用户选择暂不修，留给后续 phase。
